---
title: "Psychology Projects"
format: html
---

# Psychology Projects

Welcome to my work in psychology! Here are a few things I’ve worked on:

## 🔍 Psychometric Tool Development
Built a multidimensional extraversion scale and an item-generation tool (*Psydeon*).

## 🧠 Neuropsych Experiments
Analyzed ADHD fMRI data using Nilearn and basic VBM pipelines.

## 📘 Writing
- *Do You Exist?* — A beginner's epistemology guide for psychology students.
- *The Art of Almost* — A personal narrative exploring ADHD.

[← Back to Home](../index.qmd)
